description: Aboveground herbaceous crop residue (cereals legumes vegetables forage); Spain_Hist Biomass_coefs Residue_humified_kgC_kgC herbaceous average.

Aboveground weed and spontaneous-grass biomass; Spain_Hist uses the Grass Residue_humified_kgC_kgC value for weeds.

Livestock solid and liquid manure averaged over species; Spain_Hist Biomass_coefs Solid/Liquid Residue_humified_kgC_kgC.
Livestock total excreta averaged over species (grazing returns); Spain_Hist Biomass_coefs Excreta Residue_humified_kgC_kgC.
Urban organic waste applied to soil (aggregate); Spain_Hist Biomass_coefs Urban Residue_humified_kgC_kgC.
Composted municipal solid waste; Spain_Hist Biomass_coefs Municipal solid waste composted Residue_humified_kgC_kgC.
Stabilised compost amendment; Spain_Hist Biomass_coefs Compost Residue_humified_kgC_kgC.
